summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Class Platform major upgrade (7th iteration) - Extended teacher/student fields, group classes, edit/delete functionality, password management, recording link visibility, and email integration all working correctly

minor_issues.issue: Two test cases have inverted success logic for expected failures
minor_issues.impact: Test reporting shows incorrect results for 'should fail' scenarios

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay occasionally intercepts clicks on edit buttons

design_issues.issue: React hydration warning about <span> inside <option> elements

passed_tests: Create teacher with extended fields (phone, qualification, experience, date_of_joining, teaching_levels, subjects)
Create student with extended fields (grade, board, date_of_admission, subjects)
Schedule individual class with subject field
Schedule group class with multiple students
Admin can view classes with recording links visible
Teacher cannot see recording links (properly hidden)
Classes sorted by creation time (newest first)
Edit class functionality with pre-filled data
Forgot password endpoint works and sends email
Reset password endpoint properly validates tokens
Forgot Password link present on login page
Classes table shows Subject, Type, Edit/Delete columns
Edit and Delete buttons present for all classes (151 found)
SendGrid email integration working for credentials and password reset
